name: Chapatis (Roti)
recipeInstructions:
1. Make up the dough about 1/2-hour before you need it.
2. Allow the dough to rest for about 10 minutes.
3. Pinch off a portion of dough to form a ball about 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
4. Roll the ball flat on a lightly floured surface.
5. Pat the rolled dough back and forth between your hands until it is thin.
(Patting makes the chapati puff when baked.)
6. Cook on top of the stove on an ungreased griddle until browned and puffed.
7. Use medium heat so the griddle does not get too hot.
